ogTitle: Haywards Bay vs Hazelbrook: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Haywards Bay and Hazelbrook.
heading: Haywards Bay vs Hazelbrook — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Haywards Bay, New South Wales and Hazelbrook, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hazelbrook has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Haywards Bay (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Haywards Bay or Hazelbrook safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Haywards Bay has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Hazelbrook scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Haywards Bay scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Hazelbrook scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Haywards Bay or Hazelbrook?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hazelbrook has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
